meaning: n.印加人[语]adj.印加文化的,印加族[语]的
examples: They're not quite golden, but maybe the rich Incan history makes up for that.
The Incans also become had a prestigious educational system that extolled the benefits of Incan civilization.
When we walked the ancient, Incan ruins the next day, Larry had his mom with him and I could sense the joy he felt in her presence.
In 2005, Peruvian authorities reduced the daily number of visitors to the Incan ruins to 2, 500.
As Spanish steel beat Incan arrows, so the mule overpowered the llama of the Andes.
